title:
The Wonderful
Company :: Who We Are
text:
OUR FOUNDERS OUR HISTORY OUR DIVISIONS

#### WHO WE ARE

# Building healthy brands  
from the ground up

# The Wonderful Company is a privately held $6 billion company
committed to offering high-quality, healthy brands and helping
consumers make better choices, every day.

We grow, harvest, bottle, package, and market a diverse range
of products, including fruits, nuts, flowers, water, wines and
juices. The Wonderful Company’s diverse holdings make it the
world’s leading grower of tree nuts, America’s largest citrus
grower, and the world’s largest flower delivery service with
the Teleflora network of florists.

We believe there is incredible power in the Wonderful family
of brands to inspire healthier choices and to support our
communities. By helping nourish our neighbors with
high-quality, healthy products, we believe we can grow a
better world.

## FOUNDER BIOGRAPHIES

Stewart Resnick  
Lynda Resnick

#### WHO WE ARE

# Our Founders

## OUR FOUNDERS

## Making the world a better place, one brand at a time

The Wonderful Company was founded by entrepreneurs Stewart and Lynda Resnick. With successful careers spanning over 50 years, they’ve always
balanced achievement in business with a dedication to giving.

### At the age of 19, Lynda had already  
established a full-service advertising  
agency

creating groundbreaking campaigns that received national
attention. Around the same time, Stewart had built several
lucrative businesses. Together, as a husband-and-wife team,
they combined marketing savvy with financial and management
acumen to pursue their shared passion for producing healthy
products. They started by acquiring agricultural land in
California. Over the years, they strategically expanded their
company to encompass a diverse range of brands—from flowers,
to nuts, to beverages and beyond.

### From the very beginning, both Stewart and Lynda have made it a
personal responsibility to act as good corporate citizens.

Instead of just gauging success by numbers on a spreadsheet,
they measure it by how much they give back to their
communities and contribute to the world.

  
## FOUNDER BIOGRAPHIES

Stewart Resnick  
Lynda Resnick

#### OUR HISTORY

# How we got where we are

1979

Stewart and Lynda Resnick purchase Teleflora

1981

The Resnicks acquire Paramount Citrus Association

1989

The Resnicks form Paramount Farms

2002

POM Wonderful is launched.

2005

FIJI Water is relaunched.

2008

Wonderful Pistachios Launches

2008

FIJI outsells Evian to become the leading premium bottled
water in the U.S.

2009

Get Crackin’® marketing campaign for pistachios launches

2010

JUSTIN Vineyards becomes part of The Wonderful Company

2011

Landmark Vineyards becomes part of The Wonderful Company

2013

Wonderful Halos is launched

2015

The Wonderful Company launches

2019

JNSQ is launched

2019

Wonderful Seedless Lemons Launches

2021

Lewis Cellars becomes part of The Wonderful Company

#### OUR BRANDS

# How we support our brands

Wonderful Pistachios & Almonds

Wonderful Citrus

Wonderful Agency

Strategy Group

Wonderful Sales

Wonderful Real Estate

WONDERFUL PISTACHIOS & ALMONDS

#### WONDERFUL PISTACHIOS & ALMONDS

## From our trees to your heart

Here in the San Joaquin Valley, the warm days and cool nights work
in harmony with the region’s naturally rich soils to create
perfect growing conditions for the perfect snack—heart-healthy
nuts loved by consumers around the globe.

Wonderful Pistachios & Almonds is the world's largest
grower and processor of almonds and pistachios. They are grown
under Wonderful Orchards and processed and marketed under
Wonderful Pistachios & Almonds.

### Our Approach

As farmers, we believe that what you put into your body matters . The most nutritious and best-tasting foods are
those that are from nature.

That’s why we are dedicated to our role as environmental stewards,
investing significant time and resources on implementing
water-efficient irrigation practices, biorational pest control,
and reducing energy use. And we are continually evaluating how we
can further lessen our impact while continuing to harvest the most
delicious, nutritious snacks.

* * *

[View our career opportunities ›](https://careers.wonderful.com/brands/wonderful-pistachios) [Visit our site ›](http://www.wonderfulpistachiosandalmonds.com/)

WONDERFUL CITRUS

#### WONDERFUL CITRUS

## Committed to consistent quality

At Wonderful Citrus, we’re passionate about growing the
high-quality, great-tasting citrus products you’ve come to know
and love, like Wonderful® Halos® mandarins, lemons, limes and
oranges. In fact, we are the largest integrated grower, packer,
and shipper of fresh citrus in the United States. With a staff of
approximately 1,500 people during peak season, nine packing
facilities and state-of-the-art equipment, we supply fresh citrus
to our customers year-round.

### How we work

First and foremost, we’re growers. That means we control the land
and have oversight over the entire process from planting to
picking, from tree to table. This means you get consistent, fresh,
and “wonderful” citrus—every time.

Secondly, our acreage and scale allow us to be at the forefront of
progressive agricultural techniques including water conservation
efforts, specialized nurseries, and integrated pest management
programs.

* * *

[View our career opportunities ›](https://careers.wonderful.com/business-units/wonderful-citrus) [Visit our site ›](http://www.wonderfulcitrus.com/)

WONDERFUL AGENCY

#### WONDERFUL AGENCY

## Supporting our brands with creative innovation

Wonderful Agency is the in-house, full-service advertising and
communications agency at The Wonderful Company. We're dedicated to
creative excellence across all media (television, web, print,
outdoor, POS, mobile and social media) to build consumer awareness
and relevance across our brands. Wonderful Agency creates
effective and innovative campaigns that match the quality of the
highest echelon of global firms, while offering an environment
that is far more entrepreneurial and fast-paced than a traditional
agency. Wonderful Agency is highly integrated in direct brand and
product development decisions with ownership, business unit
leadership, legal, strategy and other key stakeholders.

### How we work

Our lean organizational structure rewards people who take
initiative, foresee problems, and come armed with solutions.
Working within teams of media planners, producers, designers, art
directors, writers, social media managers, public relations
associates and technologists, our people develop agile campaigns
that can be deployed within days—not months or years.

* * *

[View our career opportunities ›](https://careers.wonderful.com/business-units/wonderful-agency) [Visit our site ›](https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-wonderful-company)

STRATEGY GROUP

#### STRATEGY GROUP

## Helping our companies run even better

The Strategy Group at The Wonderful Company works directly with
our operating company presidents and senior management to help
drive critical strategic, operational and organizational
initiatives. Prior to joining the group, many of our people
enjoyed successful careers at the most prestigious management
consulting firms, while others played leadership roles at
entrepreneurial organizations of all sizes.

### How we work

We passionately believe that success requires a sustainable
balance between professional and personal obligations. In the
Strategy Group, we encourage our people to strive for excellence
in their jobs while leading healthy, rewarding lives.

* * *

[View our career opportunities ›](https://careers.wonderful.com/business-units/the-wonderful-company)

WONDERFUL SALES

#### WONDERFUL SALES

## Getting our products into the hands of consumers

Established in 2008, Wonderful Sales is the produce sales
organization for The Wonderful Company, servicing Wonderful
Pistachios, Wonderful Halos, and POM Wonderful, and merchandising
for FIJI Water in the U.S. and Canada.

### How we work

Our team of over 250 employees enjoys a working environment that
nourishes professional development, with excellent training and
great opportunities for long-term growth.

* * *

[View our career opportunities ›](https://careers.wonderful.com/business-units/wonderful-sales)

WONDERFUL REAL ESTATE

#### WONDERFUL REAL ESTATE

## The real deal in real estate

Wonderful Real Estate acquires, develops, and manages commercial
real estate properties with a particular focus on office and
industrial properties in California. Our real estate development
team is currently developing three business parks totaling over
1,865 acres in California’s Central Valley. A number of the
properties in these parks have already been purchased or leased by
Fortune 500 companies and other high-quality anchor tenants. Our
property management team provides a full range of professional
property management services to over 30 properties owned by The
Wonderful Company and its affiliates, constituting over 4 million
square feet of actively managed office and industrial properties.

### How we work

Our team is small, but nimble. We leverage our capabilities by
utilizing in-house legal, finance, and capital projects resources
of The Wonderful Company, resulting in a streamlined underwriting
and deal-negotiation process. We create long-term, trusted
relationships with our clients through development of the best
solutions for their real estate needs, and professional property
management once their project is complete.

* * *
